description: Envelope returned by run_stage for every stage invocation

status.description: High-level outcome of the stage run

output.description: Parsed structured output from the Claude CLI response; null on error

raw.description: Raw stdout from the Claude CLI call before structured output extraction

denials.description: Tool names blocked by permission hooks during this stage run

model.description: Model ID that produced the final output, e.g. haiku, sonnet, opus

error_kind.description: Machine-readable error classification; null when status is success

elapsed_ms.description: Wall-clock milliseconds from stage invocation to return
